name: Asian Beef Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 packages ramen instant noodle soup (3 oz. each)
2 1/2 cups Chinese cabbage or green cabbage, thinly sliced
3 carrots, peeled and cut into slices
1/2 lb. cooked round steak, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, mix water, soy sauce, chili sauce (or ketchup), ginger, and cayenne pepper.
2. Add one seasoning packet from the noodles to the mixture. Reserve the other packet for another use.
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
4. Add cabbage and carrots; cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms, corn, and noodles; simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Add beef and green onions. Heat through.
7. Stir in sesame oil. Note: Cooked, chopped chicken may be used instead of beef.
